title: dalbergia stipulacea
intro: Dalbergia stipulacea, also known as the 'kamagong', is a tropical tree species native to the Philippines. The kamagong tree is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids in its bark and leaves. The health benefits of the kamagong tree include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of kamagong typically involve boiling its bark and leaves to create teas or infusions that can be used to treat various health issues.
